data.name: CG-MuTra: Continuously-Gated Multi-Terrain Adaptive Recovery for Unified Humanoid Fall Recovery and Locomotion

data.description: CG-MuTra: Continuously-Gated Multi-Terrain Adaptive Recovery for Unified Humanoid Fall Recovery and Locomotion uses Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
CG-MuTra: Continuously-Gated Multi-Terrain Adaptive Recovery for Unified Humanoid Fall Recovery and Locomotion uses Sim-to-Real Transfer.
CG-MuTra: Continuously-Gated Multi-Terrain Adaptive Recovery for Unified Humanoid Fall Recovery and Locomotion uses Domain Randomization.
